title: DS.01.03 Teff MOA-seq protocol
author: Rossi, Vincenzo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains data on the adjusted protocol for MOAseq in tef.  
  The protocol consists of adjustments to the existing MOAseq procedure for other plant species.
steps_raw:
This dataset contains data on the adjusted protocol for MOAseq in tef.
